title: Raccoon Removal East New York Brooklyn | $900-$4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal in East New York, Brooklyn. Licensed experts serving residential and commercial properties. Same-day service available. Call for a free estimate!
intro: East New York residents face unique raccoon challenges due to the neighborhood's mix of residential homes, multi-family buildings, and proximity to green spaces like Highland Park. Our professional raccoon removal services protect your property from these intelligent and persistent wildlife intruders. Best Pest Control NYC provides humane, effective raccoon removal with prices ranging from $900 to $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving East New York for years with licensed wildlife technicians who understand the specific challenges of Brooklyn properties, from older wood-frame homes to newer developments. We offer same-day emergency service, humane removal methods, complete attic restoration, and preventative exclusion work to ensure raccoons don't return to your property.
localContext: East New York's diverse housing stock—from single-family homes near Cypress Hills Cemetery to multi-family buildings along Atlantic and Linden Avenues—provides numerous entry points for raccoons seeking shelter. The neighborhood's proximity to parks and the former Gateway National Recreation Area means raccoon populations remain active year-round, making professional wildlife control essential for property owners.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in East New York?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in East New York typically costs between $900 and $4,000. Basic removal and exclusion for a single raccoon starts around $900, while extensive infestations requiring multiple visits, attic cleanup, insulation replacement, and comprehensive sealing can reach $4,000. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in East New York, Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are quite common in East New York due to the neighborhood's proximity to Highland Park, Cypress Hills Cemetery, and various green spaces. They frequently seek shelter in attics, crawl spaces, and beneath porches, especially during breeding season in spring and when seeking warm shelter in fall and winter.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my East New York property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service in East New York for urgent raccoon situations. Initial trapping and removal typically begins within 24 hours of your call. Complete removal timeframes vary from 3-7 days for single animals to 2-3 weeks for families with babies, followed by exclusion work to seal entry points and prevent future intrusions.

faqs.question: Do you offer humane raccoon removal in East New York?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use only humane, NYC-approved methods for raccoon removal including live trapping and relocation when appropriate. During baby season, we ensure mother and young are kept together and relocated safely. All our methods comply with New York State wildlife regulations and prioritize the well-being of the animals while protecting your property.
